name: Who Lives Here?
storyIntro: The forest animals have lost their names! Can you help them remember?
storyOutro: The animals are so happy! They remember their names now!

tasks.prompt: Which animal lives in the ocean and jumps out of the water?
tasks.hint: It swims and is very friendly.

tasks.prompt: Which animal has feathers and can fly high in the sky?
tasks.hint: It has big wings and sharp eyes.

tasks.prompt: Match each animal to where it lives.
tasks.hint: Think about where each animal lives.

tasks.prompt: Which animal carries its baby in a pouch?
tasks.hint: It lives in Australia and hops!

tasks.prompt: A ___ is a very big animal that lives in rivers in Africa.
Which animal is very small and can climb walls?
tasks.hint: It has scales and a long tail.

tasks.prompt: Match the animal to the right word.
tasks.hint: Think about what makes each animal special.

tasks.prompt: Which of these animals can you see at a museum?
tasks.hint: Museums show things from long ago.

tasks.prompt: At the zoo, we can see a ___, a ___, and a ___.
This animal has a colorful beak and can talk!
tasks.hint: It lives in the jungle and has feathers.
